text:
待ってました！
うわぁー！　予想以上に立派なお肉……
ホレボレしちゃう！

いっそアークスを辞めて
私のカフェの専属調達人に
なっちゃう、なんてどう？

あ、ダメだ！　アークスを辞めたら
洞窟へも行けなくなっちゃうもんね。
あ、これ今回のお礼ね！

おかげで、私もお料理がますます
楽しくなってるの。
絶対、また何かお願いするからね！

You're back, and wow! This is an even juicier
cut than I dared to hope for!
I'm drooling just looking at it!

I don't suppose you'd ever consider giving
ARKS your two week notice and working
full-time getting ingredients for us,
would you?

Oh, no, wait! If you left ARKS, you wouldn't be
able to get to the caves anymore anyway.
I almost forgot, here's your reward!

Having you around has really kicked my
culinary exploits up a notch. Just wait,
I'll cook up another great errand for you!
